name: mana-public
description: Read-only Streamable HTTP MCP surface for Mana public community data: published creations, popular tags, creator profiles, and app share data.

tools.name: search_community_apps
tools.description: Search and browse published Mana creations.

tools.name: get_popular_tags
tools.description: List popular tags used by the Mana community.

tools.name: get_creator_profile
tools.description: Look up a public Mana creator profile.

tools.name: get_app_share
tools.description: Fetch public share data for one Mana creation.
